mapper.select: select * from hrm_attendance_plan where emp_id=#{employeeId} and work_date=#{shiftDate}

SELECT count(distinct check_type,user_id,work_date) FROM hrm_attendance_plan WHERE check_type = 'OnDuty' AND group_id = '954235104' AND work_date BETWEEN #{beginDate} AND #{endDate} and emp_id=(select employee_id FROM hrm_employee WHERE entry_status=1 and post='行政文员' limit 1) and plan_check_time is not null
